description: Perform a structural dynamic tuning of the NREL 5MW wind turbine blade to avoid resonance. Load the 'NREL 5MW' sample project from /home/ga/Documents/sample_projects/ and modify the blade's structural properties to increase the 1st Flapwise Eigenfrequency to a target of at least 0.75 Hz. Save the modified project to /home/ga/Documents/projects/stiffened_blade.wpa and create a report at /home/ga/Documents/projects/resonance_report.txt containing the final frequency in Hz (e.g., 'New_Frequency: 0.78').
